title: GUI Time
description: clock hud and a 24-hour digital clock, and an optional sleep indicator to show when you can sleep.
body:
# GUI Time **GUI Time** is a Fabric mod for Minecraft, displaying both the default Minecraft analog clock and a digital 24-hour time display. --- ## 🖼️ Preview | **Sleep Now** | **Sleep Soon** | |--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------| | ![Sleep now (everything on)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d5a3af7bd4219ce885eb72bfa43a9d4f17b3d379.png) | ![Sleep Soon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/43455f818356e7bc2d569bb574e517b9d35cb09f.png) | --- ## 📌 Features * **Flexible Display Modes:**
Choose between showing only the analog clock, only the digital time, both, or neither. * **Customizable HUD Placement:**
Choose placement (Top Left, Top Right, Bottom Left, Bottom Right or Top Middle) where the HUD elements appear. * **Sleep Indicator:**
Visual indicator. A yellow "!" appears when it’s nearly time to sleep
and a red "!" when you can sleep. * **Weather Aware:**
Automatically adjusts the sleep indicator based on weather conditions (rain, thunder, clear skies). * **Phantom Spawn Indicator:**
Visual indicator shows a phantom icon if you have not slept for long enough for them to spawn. --- ## ⚙️ Configuration ![Settings](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/sn69y69I/images/d7206468cbf8053b68bdf054f0d7296328feae8d.png) --- ## 🔗 Dependencies ### Required ### Optional (Recommended) --- ## 👥 Credits ### 💡 Feature Requests - **Phantom indicator:** [Celesian](https://github.com/Celesian) ![Celesian](https://minotar.net/avatar/Celesian/24)
